div.h1: AoS vs SoA: Cache Line Utilization
div.h2: Position-Only Access Pattern (x, y, z fields)

div.p: Memory Efficiency Analysis: • Useful bytes: 12 (x,y,z) / 28 (total) • Utilization: 42.8% • Bandwidth Waste: 57.2% (Cold data fetched) • Particles per line: 2.28
Memory Efficiency Analysis: • Useful bytes: 64 / 64 (full line) • Utilization: 100% • Bandwidth Waste: 0.0% • Particles per line: 16 (7x increase)

g.text: 100% UTILIZATION: Every byte is used by the CPU
